goals.text: Implement the complete Ama's Kitchen delivery-ordering MVP defined in Amas-Kitchen-PRD.md.

requirements.text: Deliver all customer, admin, and system acceptance criteria in PRD v3.0.

constraints.text: Do not deploy or provision infrastructure; implement and document deployment-ready configuration and 30-day backup requirements.

architectureDecisions.text: Use the existing React/Vite frontend, Express backend, and MongoDB/Mongoose persistence with REST APIs.

technicalDecisions.text: Send admin order emails through Nodemailer using configurable SMTP and recipient environment variables.

history.text: Superseded by explicit Telegram-only notification request.

technicalDecisions.text: Send order notifications through Telegram Bot API sendMessage with native Node 22 fetch and required bot token/chat ID; reject HTTP and API failures.
Food items store multiple validated image URLs; file upload and Cloudinary administration are excluded.
Provide an idempotent seed command for editable sample menu, delivery zones, and default settings.

domainKnowledge.text: Ama's Kitchen is a single-location, delivery-only, Cash-on-Delivery restaurant closed every Sunday in Europe/London.

risks.text: Atomic sequencing, idempotent checkout, server-side repricing, and cookie security require explicit concurrency and integration verification.

artifacts.text: Complete MVP and Telegram-only notification workflow artifacts are stored under _workflow/runs/dev; Fallow audit is PASSED.

history.text: Specification artifact advanced to complete workflow artifact set.
Added Telegram implementation and passed final evidence.

workflowHistory.text: MVP tasks and TASK-006 Telegram-only notifications completed; workflow health and Fallow verdict Passed.

history.text: Advanced from specification approval to workflow complete.
Completed TASK-006 and final workflow stages.

changeLog.text: Initialized run memory from intake and specification.
Captured Telegram-only notification intake, resolved the prior SMTP decision, and saved the detailed specification.
Completed TASK-006 and all final workflow stages with Passed health and Fallow verdicts.
